name: Podcasts
description: Manage podcast subscriptions with automatic RSS feed updates, episode downloads, auto-delete after listening, and daily auto-playlist generation.
overview: Subscribe to podcast RSS feeds, automatically download new episodes, manage auto-deletion of listened content, and generate a daily auto-playlist of unlistened episodes.
changelog:
- Fixed: Auto-delete now uses Jellyfin LastPlayedDate as fallback when internal ListenDate is not tracked
- Fixed: Episodes played from external clients (phone, TV app) now correctly get a 2-day grace period based on LastPlayedDate
- Fixed: Auto-delete ALWAYS enforces the 2-day window before deleting episodes
- Fixed: Auto-delete scans actual podcast directories on disk instead of relying solely on episode-data.xml
- Fixed: Episodes not found in Jellyfin library are logged and skipped (no silent failures)
- Improved: All diagnostic messages use Information level (visible in normal logs)
- Improved: Logs show listen date and scheduled delete date for transparency
